summary: Backend testing complete for AJVJ Hidropónicos. 24/24 pytest tests passed covering auth, RBAC, modules, company, clients, remisiones (draft/confirmed/year-prefix numbering/totals), dashboard stats, and module yield stats.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 579 lines - consider splitting into routers (auth/clients/remisiones/modules/dashboard) if the app grows.
No password-change or user-update endpoint - only create/delete. Consider adding PUT /api/users/{id} for password resets.
No brute-force lockout on /auth/login (playbook suggests 5-fail lockout). Not requested in features, but worth flagging.
CORSMiddleware uses allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True which browsers reject for cookie-based auth. OK currently since frontend uses Bearer tokens, but should be tightened.

_next_number() uses find_one_and_update with upsert=True but doesn't set ReturnDocument.AFTER explicitly - works due to return_document=True (motor accepts truthy), tests confirm correct sequential behavior.
RemisionIn.id is accepted from client body - potential ID-spoofing; backend overrides on POST but on PUT it trusts path param which is correct.
DELETE /api/clients/{cid} does not check for references in remisiones (could orphan remisiones' client_id).
test_credentials: admin@ajvj.mx / admin123 (seeded on startup, verified working). TEST_op_* operador users created during RBAC tests.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST Cliente, TEST operador user, and several TEST remisiones via API during testing. Modules A/B/C updated. Company set to 'AJVJ TEST'. These were NOT cleaned up; main agent may want a fresh DB for production.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully functional. All 24 backend tests pass including year-prefix numbering (2026-XXXX), sequential increment, draft->confirmed transition assigning number, totals computation, cycle overlap/max-2 validation, and operador RBAC restrictions on PUT /company, PUT /modules/{id}, DELETE /remisiones/{id}, GET/POST /users. Test data left in DB (TEST_ prefix). Next step: frontend integration testing.
